title: 責められるべきはトレーナー？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Mejiro McQueen decides to participate
in a scrimmage at the academy as part of her
training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So I placed second, huh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I gave it everything I had, but when it comes to
competing on a straight track...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since Mejiro McQueen's debut race, we've
been training for the spring Tenno Sho, just as she
requested.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this being such a long-term plan, our focus
is centered on basic fitness training.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
...Say, is that the Mejiro prodigy? I heard she's
got a lot of talent, but...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I'm not convinced. Her reactions were
bad, and she didn't handle the race so well.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, her? I think she's still on a basic training
routine.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Basic training?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
That's probably why she couldn't react when she
needed to.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Postponing the kind of hands-on training needed
to win, huh? That takes a lot of confidence.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Probably. But at this rate, she won't be prepared
for next year's Classics.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't do that to my racers. All of mine have
their hearts set to compete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They have a point. The current regimen I've set
ignores the challenges she'll face in the short
term.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her innate abilities will help pull her
through in the end. I'm sure she understands this
as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Hellooo! Is something the matter? You
were staring off into space.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, after training, Mejiro McQueen
says she has something to talk to me about.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer... Could you take a look at this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro McQueen shows me a piece of paper.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It's a new training regimen I thought of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I know that long-term strength development is
important, but I thought maybe we should
consider how to win the junior-year races as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems somewhat unsure of herself. Hmm, I
wonder...
choice_data_list: Did someone say something to you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...! N-no, that's not...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway, please give some thought to the
training regimen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen leaves, almost like she's running
away...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? That you, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh... Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Why the long face?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh right, you were in the scrimmage yesterday...
Is it something about that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: To tell you the truth... Well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My trainer seems to be enduring criticism on my
account.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan listens to Mejiro McQueen's
concerns.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Ohh, I get it. So that's why you asked to change
your training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But is that really what you and your trainer want?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You promised each other to give it your all for
the Tenno Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I figured you'd wanna keep that promise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Both you and your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's likely that Mejiro McQueen made that
proposal to protect my reputation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But that shouldn't be her concern.
choice_data_list: I can't be the reason she's holding herself back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I decide to talk with Mejiro
McQueen again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When I do...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I am so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Please disregard the training regimen I put forth
yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That was, well... It was not an act of sincerity.
choice_data_list: I thought that might be the case.
I thought that might be the case.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: S-so you noticed?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: In truth, I'm fine with the current regimen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
After all, the two of us promised we'd aim for the
Tenno Sho together!
choice_data_list: Then there's no need to doubt ourselves.
Then there's no need to doubt ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I shall continue to devote my efforts to
winning the Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter what other people say, we shouldn't
change our goal. Mejiro McQueen and I renew
our promise to each other.
